creator: Doug@gorean.org
text:
I am the maintainer of the sirc port. These are some small updates
to a better distribution site, and my e-mail address.

Fix: Apply the following small patches:




Sorry about the late date, real life is keeping me busy.

Doug--qvIlsFPARqK7d0RZiBDsdgTsOrPNdnUx1sFDCT6pkHleJ1tX
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.Dist	Wed Aug 25 00:14:22 1999
+++ Makefile	Thu Sep  9 17:33:51 1999
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for: sirc
 # Version required:                  2.211
 # Date created:                      4 May 1998
-# Whom:                              Studded <Studded@dal.net>
+# Whom:                              Doug Barton <Doug@gorean.org>
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/irc/sirc/Makefile,v 1.5 1999/08/25 06:12:58 obrien Exp $
 #
@@ -15,10 +15,9 @@
 DISTNAME=	sirc-2.211
 CATEGORIES=	irc
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.eleves.ens.fr:8080/home/espel/sirc/ \
-		ftp://ftp1.dal.net/dalnet/clients/unix/sirc/ \
-		ftp://ftp2.dal.net/dalnet/clients/unix/sirc/
+		http://freebsd.simplenet.com/Downloads/
 
-MAINTAINER=	Studded@dal.net
+MAINTAINER=	Doug@gorean.org
 
 USE_PERL5=	yes
 
How-To-Repeat: 
	DNA
